name: Rotolone/ Raviolone
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the flour to create a small mound with a hole in the center where the eggs will be added gradually. Mix the eggs with the flour using a fork.
2. When all the eggs are well mixed, knead the dough until it is smooth.
3. Place the dough on a lightly floured surface and roll out with a rolling pin to achieve a large, flat sheet of dough.
4. In a pot, melt the butter and add the garlic, frozen spinach, and spices. Cook for about 10-15 minutes after all the spinach has thawed.
5. Mix the spinach with the ricotta and some Parmesan cheese and spread the mixture on the pasta sheet.
6. Roll the pasta into a strudel shape and wrap it in a smooth kitchen towel and tie the ends with string.
7. Cook the ravioli for 20 minutes in boiling salted water. Remove from the water and unwrap the towel.
8. Before serving, slice the ravioli and warm the slices in a pan with some olive oil or butter until they are browned and crispy.
9. Serve hot with tomato sauce and Parmesan.
Note: Use bread flour for best results.
